chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3059 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 29.08.2025 Mr. Salahuddin Khan Gandapur, Advocate along with Peer Durwaish, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG Sindh. Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition and submits that since the CNS Act has been amended and proviso for bail has also been inserted in the Act, therefore, he will approach the trail Court for grant of bail. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS
